=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (4:39-4:64) TS377016: `Effect.void` represents the same outcome as `Effect.succeed(undefined)` or `Effect.succeed(void 0)`. effect(effectSucceedWithVoid)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.void"

[D2] (7:35-7:57) TS377016: `Effect.void` represents the same outcome as `Effect.succeed(undefined)` or `Effect.succeed(void 0)`. effect(effectSucceedWithVoid)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.void"

[D3] (10:52-10:79) TS377016: `Effect.void` represents the same outcome as `Effect.succeed(undefined)` or `Effect.succeed(void 0)`. effect(effectSucceedWithVoid)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.void"

[D4] (13:48-13:72) TS377016: `Effect.void` represents the same outcome as `Effect.succeed(undefined)` or `Effect.succeed(void 0)`. effect(effectSucceedWithVoid)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.void"

[D5] (16:58-16:87) TS377016: `Effect.void` represents the same outcome as `Effect.succeed(undefined)` or `Effect.succeed(void 0)`. effect(effectSucceedWithVoid)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.void"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.void" ===

--- file:///.src/effectSucceedWithVoid.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed(undefined)
export const shouldTriggerUndefined = Effect.void

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed(void 0)
export const shouldTriggerVoid0 = Effect.succeed(void 0)

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed((undefined)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.succeed((undefined))

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed((void 0)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedVoid0 = Effect.succeed((void 0))

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed(((undefined))) - double parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerDoubleParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.succeed(((undefined)))

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.succeed with actual value
export const shouldNotTriggerNumber = Effect.succeed(1)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.succeed with string value
export const shouldNotTriggerString = Effect.succeed("hello")

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.succeed with null (not void)
export const shouldNotTriggerNull = Effect.succeed(null)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.succeed with object
export const shouldNotTriggerObject = Effect.succeed({ foo: "bar" })

// Should NOT trigger: already using Effect.void
export const shouldNotTriggerVoid = Effect.void


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.void" ===

--- file:///.src/effectSucceedWithVoid.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed(undefined)
export const shouldTriggerUndefined = Effect.succeed(undefined)

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed(void 0)
export const shouldTriggerVoid0 = Effect.void

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed((undefined)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.succeed((undefined))

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed((void 0)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedVoid0 = Effect.succeed((void 0))

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed(((undefined))) - double parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerDoubleParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.succeed(((undefined)))

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.succeed with actual value
export const shouldNotTriggerNumber = Effect.succeed(1)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.succeed with string value
export const shouldNotTriggerString = Effect.succeed("hello")

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.succeed with null (not void)
export const shouldNotTriggerNull = Effect.succeed(null)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.succeed with object
export const shouldNotTriggerObject = Effect.succeed({ foo: "bar" })

// Should NOT trigger: already using Effect.void
export const shouldNotTriggerVoid = Effect.void


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.void" ===

--- file:///.src/effectSucceedWithVoid.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed(undefined)
export const shouldTriggerUndefined = Effect.succeed(undefined)

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed(void 0)
export const shouldTriggerVoid0 = Effect.succeed(void 0)

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed((undefined)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.void

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed((void 0)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedVoid0 = Effect.succeed((void 0))

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed(((undefined))) - double parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerDoubleParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.succeed(((undefined)))

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.succeed with actual value
export const shouldNotTriggerNumber = Effect.succeed(1)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.succeed with string value
export const shouldNotTriggerString = Effect.succeed("hello")

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.succeed with null (not void)
export const shouldNotTriggerNull = Effect.succeed(null)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.succeed with object
export const shouldNotTriggerObject = Effect.succeed({ foo: "bar" })

// Should NOT trigger: already using Effect.void
export const shouldNotTriggerVoid = Effect.void


=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.void" ===

--- file:///.src/effectSucceedWithVoid.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed(undefined)
export const shouldTriggerUndefined = Effect.succeed(undefined)

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed(void 0)
export const shouldTriggerVoid0 = Effect.succeed(void 0)

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed((undefined)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.succeed((undefined))

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed((void 0)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedVoid0 = Effect.void

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed(((undefined))) - double parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerDoubleParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.succeed(((undefined)))

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.succeed with actual value
export const shouldNotTriggerNumber = Effect.succeed(1)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.succeed with string value
export const shouldNotTriggerString = Effect.succeed("hello")

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.succeed with null (not void)
export const shouldNotTriggerNull = Effect.succeed(null)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.succeed with object
export const shouldNotTriggerObject = Effect.succeed({ foo: "bar" })

// Should NOT trigger: already using Effect.void
export const shouldNotTriggerVoid = Effect.void


=== [D5] Fix 0: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 1: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.void" ===

--- file:///.src/effectSucceedWithVoid.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed(undefined)
export const shouldTriggerUndefined = Effect.succeed(undefined)

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed(void 0)
export const shouldTriggerVoid0 = Effect.succeed(void 0)

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed((undefined)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.succeed((undefined))

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed((void 0)) - parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerParenthesizedVoid0 = Effect.succeed((void 0))

// Should trigger: Effect.succeed(((undefined))) - double parenthesized
export const shouldTriggerDoubleParenthesizedUndefined = Effect.void

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.succeed with actual value
export const shouldNotTriggerNumber = Effect.succeed(1)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.succeed with string value
export const shouldNotTriggerString = Effect.succeed("hello")

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.succeed with null (not void)
export const shouldNotTriggerNull = Effect.succeed(null)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.succeed with object
export const shouldNotTriggerObject = Effect.succeed({ foo: "bar" })

// Should NOT trigger: already using Effect.void
export const shouldNotTriggerVoid = Effect.void
